subcategory: Award of Order / Receipt of Order
clean_headline: Data Patterns (India) Limited secured a Rs. 279 crore contract for supply of 34 Doppler Weather Radars to the Indian Meteorological Department.
raw_headline: We are pleased to inform you that the Company has received a contract for Rs.279 Crore for supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars to Indian Metrological Department.
